description_long: This object is a long, straight-bladed sword with a single-edged design, featuring a metallic blade that tapers to a fine point. The blade is sleek and reflective, suggesting it is made of polished steel or a similar metal. The handle is black, ribbed for grip, and appears to be constructed from a synthetic or polymer material, possibly with a metal core for strength. A small, rectangular guard separates the blade from the handle, providing basic hand protection. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or ornamentation. The sword is well-balanced and streamlined, suitable for practical use rather than ceremonial display.
description: A modern, straight-edged sword with a polished metal blade and a ribbed black handle, separated by a small rectangular guard. The design is sleek and functional, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight, single-edged blade and the ribbed black handle with a small rectangular guard.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the rectangular profile of the guard and handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, displaying the blade's length and the handle's ribbed texture.
description_view_3: Handle-end view showing the circular cross-section of the handle and the alignment of the blade with the grip.
attribute_handle_design: straight, ribbed black polymer, ergonomic grip
